authorization_phrase: Authorize s17-d1 broad-universe cross-sectional momentum continuation bundle (Step 6 branch: P6 INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE -> P7/P11 terminal).

candidate_archival_state.archival_reason: INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE at P6 IS via K9 (closed_trades=85 < 100); low-turnover rotation K9-blocked

central_finding.framework_validation: The K9 gate did exactly its job: it refused to certify a positive-looking IS edge that rests on too few realized round-trips. No gate was relaxed; cadence was NOT tuned to manufacture trades.
central_finding.headline: The cross-sectional momentum edge looked POSITIVE in-sample, but the locked monthly top-6 rotation is structurally too LOW-TURNOVER to clear the K9 sample floor -- the candidate is K9-blocked at the IS gate, exactly the primary kill-risk this candidate was flagged for.
central_finding.k9_vs_oos_note: K9 OOS (>=50/y) would be EVEN harder than the IS total floor for this cadence (~17/y observed IS). The candidate could not have reached an OOS-meaningful sample without changing the locked cadence -- which is forbidden.
central_finding.positive_but_unverifiable_edge: IS expectancy +$1130.7539/trade, sharpe_proxy/trade +0.285318, win 63.53%, profit_factor 2.418182, P/L 1.388216, total return 145.7895%, maxDD 31.3989% (K1/K2/K4 all PASS). BUT only 85 closed trades -> the positive edge is statistically UNVERIFIABLE at the required sample floor.

diagnostic_only_disclosure: DIAGNOSTIC-ONLY; NOT live-ready, NOT paper-ready, NOT Strategy-Lab-ready, NOT FRC-granted. Trading PAUSED; Live BLOCKED_AT_6_GATES; FRC NEVER_GRANTED. No promotion of any kind.
framework_k13_binding: walk-forward persistence (52a3b60); K13 NOT reached (P6 terminal); binding for future s17+ candidates

lessons_eligible_for_lessons_md_in_a_sep: LESSON_S17_D1_001 (eligible; NOT written): For low-turnover cross-sectional rotation, K9 (sample sufficiency) is the binding constraint BEFORE edge sign. A monthly top-6 rotation on 24 names yields ~17 closed trades/y (85 over 5y IS) -- below the 100 floor -- so even a strongly positive IS profile (expectancy +$1.1k/trade, win 63.5%, PF 2.42) is INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE. Turnover, not breadth, drives K9.

LESSON_S17_D1_002 (eligible; NOT written): The disciplined response to a K9 shortfall is a TERMINAL block, NOT a cadence/M tune. Tuning the rebalance frequency to manufacture trades would be reverse-fitting the sample floor; the locked spec is honored and a higher-turnover design is a FRESH candidate.

LESSON_S17_D1_003 (eligible; NOT written): The K9-per-fold/sample reachability concern, surfaced honestly at PLAN/DRAFT/SEAL as the candidate's PRIMARY kill-risk, predicted the exact terminal -- pre-registering the kill-risk made the outcome interpretable rather than surprising.
WARNING (eligible; NOT written): lessons would be written only under a separate explicit authorization. This memo does NOT touch lessons.md.

full_arc_recorded.p6_5_cost_stress: NOT_RUN (P6 terminal at INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE per the bundle Step 6 branch)

inherited_constraints_block_VERBATIM_FRO: K9_THRESHOLD_INVIOLATE: closed_trades >= 100 total; OOS >= 50/y; no relaxation at any phase. K9-per-fold/OOS is THE PRIMARY kill-risk for this low-turnover rotation.

K13_WALK_FORWARD_BINDING (by-reference 52a3b60): locked rule positive in >=3 of 5 fixed pre-committed UNSEARCHED OOS folds + aggregate net>0 + K9 (per-fold OR aggregate); P6.7 before P10; VALIDATION not optimization; NO per-fold refit (INVIOLATE; T-FORBID-22). Fold boundaries LOCKED byte-equivalent at SEAL (DA22).
K9-per-fold/OOS shortfall under the LOCKED monthly cadence = TERMINAL BLOCK, NOT a tuning trigger; a different cadence/lookback/M is a SEPARATE fresh candidate_record_id.

RELATIVE-MOMENTUM-FIRST-PRINCIPLES (BINDING): signal=126-21 trailing return (skip-month); select top-M=6 equal-weight; exit=loss of relative rank (no trailing/ATR stop). Hypothesis (winners continue) tested at P6 IS + P6.7 K13, never assumed.
Momentum params L=126 / S=21 / M=6 / R=21(monthly) first-principles JUSTIFIED (not tuned) and LOCKED byte-equivalent at SEAL (DA6/DA8/DA10/DA11).
DA3 equal-weight 1/M sizing; DA4=B START_CASH 100000; long-only unlevered (DR11 NOT IN CHAIN).
DR10 = v2 AND-conjunction by-reference to framework SEAL 78cd22e; thresholds 0.50/0.05 immutable; no_dr_redefinition_post_seal; cash-equity cost_drag clears strong margin.
split_only adjustment convention CONFIRMED (DA15); reuse DR9-passed CSVs; switching post-SEAL FORBIDDEN.
24-name broad universe LOCKED at PLAN; widening/substitution post-SEAL FORBIDDEN (fresh candidate_record_id required).
DR9 data-availability gate PASSED all 24 by REUSE (sealed d86e5d1; result_seal 85667ab3); NO fresh fetch; cash_equity_data_reuse_byte_equivalent.
A7 effective_independent_bets + K10 avg_pairwise_correlation + K6 dispersion LOAD-BEARING (24 names ~8 sectors); NOT the candidate's risk axis (the relative-momentum edge K1/K2/K13 is).
s16/s15/s14/s13/s12 terminal preserved verbatim; this candidate is FRESH cross-sectional momentum; clears T-FORBID-16..22; NOT re-evaluated under K13.
no_strategy_optimization_authorized: parameters first-principles justified at SEAL, NOT grid-searched; K13 fold scheme pre-committed + unsearched.
P6 IS PASS and/or K13 PASS (if reached) do NOT imply READY at OOS/live; the 6-gate live-block applies regardless; DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY_NOT_LIVE_GRADE permanent.

rec1_equivalent_oos_k9_disclosure: REC1-equivalent (BINDING): OOS K9 (>=50/y) is AT RISK for a monthly top-6 rotation (~24-72 over 2y). If observed effective OOS trade count < 50/y, OOS K9 is unreachable -> the candidate is K9-BLOCKED (terminal), NOT rescued by cadence change. The chain shall NOT relax K9.

terminal_driver.name: closed_trades_below_floor_insufficient_sample
terminal_driver.precedence_note: K9 (>=100 closed_trades) is INVIOLATE. At P6 IS the locked monthly top-6 rotation produced only 85 closed trades (17.04/y) over the 5y IS window -> INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE. This is the K9-per-fold/sample primary kill-risk flagged at PLAN/DRAFT/SEAL materializing. Per the SEAL's binding disclosure, a K9 shortfall is TERMINAL and is NOT rescued by raising the rebalance cadence or widening M (that would be a different, fresh candidate -- never a tune of this locked spec).

title: s17-d1 broad-universe cross-sectional momentum P7/P11 terminal decision memo (sealed; binding; candidate-lifecycle TERMINAL by INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE/K9 at P6 IS)
what_this_does_NOT_demonstrate: It does NOT demonstrate cross-sectional momentum is non-viable; THIS locked spec (126-21 / top-6 / monthly) on THIS 24-name basket simply does not generate enough round-trips to clear K9.
It does NOT demonstrate the IS edge is fake; the IS profile is positive but UNVERIFIABLE at this sample size.
It does NOT condemn the 24-name universe or split_only data (DR9-passed, reused, intact).
It does NOT authorize a cadence/M/lookback tune; a higher-turnover variant would be a FRESH candidate_record_id.
